summary: Comprehensive testing of Enhanced Sub-Parameter Analysis with 4 new calculation methods (elasticity, partial-correlation, OLS, Shapley), Excel/PDF/JSON export, and custom scenario integration. All 54 backend tests passed (100%). All 7 frontend tabs working correctly (Tornado, Elasticity, OLS, Shapley, What-If, Attribution, Interactions).
seed_data_creation: Used existing hub scenarios (WITCH 1.5C) and custom scenarios for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Sub-Parameter Analysis module fully tested. New endpoints: POST /elasticity (elasticity scores with interpretation), POST /partial-correlation (correlation coefficients), POST /ols-attribution (R² and coefficients with 80 samples), POST /shapley (Shapley values with n_permutations), POST /export (format=excel|pdf|json returns download URL), POST /custom-scenario/{id}/analysis (auto-runs sensitivity, elasticity, attribution), GET /custom-scenario/{id}/key-drivers (top 5 drivers). Frontend at /sub-analysis has 7 tabs. Uses Recharts for visualization.
passed_tests: Sub-Analysis page loads at /sub-analysis route after login
7 tabs present: Tornado, Elasticity, OLS, Shapley, What-If, Attribution, Interactions
Run All button triggers all analysis methods
Export Excel/PDF buttons present and functional
Scenario selector with WITCH 1.5C and other hub scenarios
Target Metric dropdown: Temperature, Physical Risk, Transition Risk, Overall Risk
Tornado tab: Tornado Chart with parameter bars, Sensitivity Rankings list with % scores
Elasticity tab: Bar chart with elasticity scores, interpretation text
OLS tab: R² badge, 80 samples badge, coefficient bar chart
Shapley tab: Contribution percentage bar chart with n permutations
What-If tab: Configure form with Parameter dropdown, Change%, From Year inputs, Run button
Attribution tab: Outcome value, Attribution Breakdown chart
